title: audit/telemetry.jsonl record
description: Per-subagent invocation telemetry. Appended by scripts/log-telemetry.sh. One record per subagent or phase-script run. Source: round L #3.

subagent.description: Subagent name (scorer, recommender, applier, etc.) or phase-script name

surface_id.description: Surface scored / acted on; null for global subagents

error.description: Short error tag like rate_limit, context_overflow
